---
title: "Home"
---

# BIMM 143 Class Portfolio

Welcome to my BIMM 143 Bioinformatics class website. This site collects my class reports, mini-projects, and assignments from the course.

## About this site

This portfolio is published with GitHub Pages and contains rendered Quarto/HTML reports for each class assignment.

## Quick links

- [Class Reports](reports.qmd)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/hubertphan/BIMM143)

## Featured work

- [Class 13: Transcriptomics and the analysis of RNA-Seq data](Class%2013/lab13.html)
- [Class 14: RNA-Seq analysis mini-project](class%2014/class14_rnaSeqMiniProject.html)
- [Class 17: Obtaining and processing SRA datasets on AWS](Class17/class17_SRA_datasets_on_AWS.html)
- [Class 18: Investigating Pertussis Resurgence](Class%2018/Class18_Investigating_Pertussis_Resurgence.html)

## Course reports

Use the navigation bar or go directly to the [Class Reports](reports.qmd) page to browse all published assignments.
